_status: DRAFT — companion hint surface, not loaded by dialogue_runner. Per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §1 Asia subsection. Targets v17 flag-keyed investigative gaps. Merges into asia_hint_states_ch1.json by inserting these states ahead of the existing quest-progression hints (JSON-order priority — see AGENTS.md §First-meeting introductions + dialogue_runner._evaluate_trigger).
_design_role_handoff: All lines voiced; ready for human Taste Standard 5/5 review. Final merge happens when the player-driven dialogue work (crab/murrow/whimsy drafts) lands in the live files.
_voice_authority: AGENTS.md §Address forms (Asia outer-circle: Dr. A. Cula / Mr. Murrow forever); style_canon.txt Asia tone; narrative_revision/voice_agents/asia.md; asia_hint_states_ch1.json (worktree) as living calibration.
_merge_note: Insert these states ahead of hint_recruited_crab in asia_hint_states_ch1.json. Priority order within this draft is specificity-first: binder-reading states before frame-error states; whimsy-posture states before bonus-evidence states; bonus-evidence states before court-ready state; post-court states last. The hint_crab_quiet_wrong_shape state must precede any generic post-recruitment hint. See per-state merge notes below.
_court_outcome_note: The post-court states assume court_outcome enum values: 'procedural_reset_full', 'procedural_reset_narrow', 'procedural_reset_with_costs'. Agent 2 (chapter1_round_1.json) should confirm these enum values. If Agent 2's values differ, update the trigger predicates before merging.

states._comment: Fires when Cula has the binder but hasn't yet read the envelope-address evidence card and hasn't engaged Crab. Asia notices the binder on the desk and where it came from this morning. Two-beat line: factual observation about the object, procedural micro-nudge via domestic-admin language. No legal vocabulary. Uses 'Mr. Murrow' and 'Dr. A. Cula'. Merge note: insert before hint_recruited_crab in live file.
lines: Mr. Murrow left the binder open on your desk this morning, Dr. A. Cula. Page one is the envelope.

states._comment: Fires when Cula has opened the envelope evidence card but not yet the renewal page. Asia knows the binder's tabs because she received it from Murrow and organized it through reception. 'In three colours' references the existing canonical 'flagged in three colors' binder pickup_line. Merge note: after hint_binder_unread_envelope.
lines: The next tab, Dr. A. Cula. Mr. Murrow flagged it in three colours.

states._comment: Fires when Cula has read the renewal but missed the cross-reference page about the 2015 renumbering. Asia ties it to a physical observation about the building she passes every day. 'Measures the brass plate' — Asia has seen Crab pause at the front entrance plate and look at it; she noticed. The year is an office fact she has heard through reception. No doctrine named. Merge note: after hint_binder_unread_renewal.
lines: Mr. Crab measures the brass plate every time he walks in, Dr. A. Cula. He says the address changed in two thousand and fifteen.

states._comment: LOAD-BEARING — per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §1 Asia subsection. Fires when Cula has proposed the merits_defence frame to Crab. Asia does not name the frame or the doctrine. She signals via Crab's visible discomfort — the two-past-reception walk is the tell she notices because she is at the desk all day. The gentle question ('He doesn't usually walk past twice') is not a question in punctuation but in implication — the player reads the gap. No legal vocabulary. One sentence per beat; no em-dash. Merge note: must precede any generic post-recruitment hint; insert after hint_binder_unread_renumbering.
lines: Mr. Crab walked past reception twice this morning, Dr. A. Cula. He doesn't usually walk past twice.

states._comment: Fires when Whimsy was recruited on the well-fitted procedural pitch. Asia observes the team is assembled; Whimsy in procedural mode means the espresso machine gets used as a rehearsal venue. Warm, light. 'Declaiming at the milk' is Asia seeing Whimsy in his natural pre-court register; she doesn't find it unusual. Merge note: after hint_crab_quiet_wrong_shape.
lines: Mr. Whimsy is at the espresso machine again, Dr. A. Cula. He's been declaiming at the milk.

states._comment: Fires when Whimsy was recruited on the wrong-shape merits pitch — he's reading the file rather than performing because he doesn't have a rhetorical frame yet. Asia observes through the small domestic signal: no espresso request. She rarely judges; she observes. 'Reading the file twice' is Whimsy's version of thinking hard. Merge note: after hint_whimsy_posture_procedural.
lines: Mr. Whimsy hasn't asked for espresso this morning, Dr. A. Cula. That tends to mean he's reading the file twice.

states._comment: Fires when Whimsy was recruited without a committed frame — he's still searching. Asia notices the doubled file request as unusual in its own way; Whimsy asking for a file twice is not how he normally operates. The line is quietly alert, not alarmed. Merge note: after hint_whimsy_posture_merits.
lines: Mr. Whimsy asked for the file twice this morning, Dr. A. Cula. He's never asked for a file twice.

states._comment: Fires when the high-trust Halina meeting produced Mrs. Wójcik's witness statement. Asia knows Mrs. Wójcik because the second-floor neighbour calls reception when the building's lift breaks — she has had that conversation. The hint confirms the witness is real and available Friday at fourteen hundred (the court time already established). Asia's confirmation of the time is the practical fact; the rest is domestic warmth. Merge note: after the whimsy-posture states.
lines: Mrs. Wójcik rang earlier. She wanted to know whether Friday at fourteen hundred was the time, Dr. A. Cula. I said yes.

states._comment: Fires when the return-to-sender slip has been collected. Asia's postal practicality is the voice anchor — she handles the post every day. She is not reading the slip for legal significance; she is reading it as a postal object and finding it accurate-looking. 'Two thousand and ten' is the year of Poczta Polska's ink standardisation per the research; it's a specific, concrete fact of the kind Asia would know from daily handling. Merge note: after hint_bonus_evidence_wojcik.
lines: The return-to-sender stamps look right, Dr. A. Cula. Poczta Polska prints the same ink they did in two thousand and ten.

states._comment: Fires when the lease chain document has been collected via the technical-stance Halina meeting. Asia's transit-warmth note: a personal connection to the housing era through her grandfather. Per style_canon.txt Asia voice, the transit-system warmth is her idiom — here it surfaces as a family-railways-and-housing connection to Mrs. Sikorska's father. Once only across the file. 'They both had flats from the housing stock' is Asia placing two people in the same historical moment. No doctrine. Merge note: after hint_bonus_evidence_slip.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska's father worked on the railways, Dr. A. Cula. My grandfather did too. They both had flats from the housing stock.

states._comment: Fires when the high-trust-extended Halina meeting produced the landlord-contact intimidation reveal. The highest-trust reveal evidence. Asia notices Mrs. Sikorska's affect as a front-desk observer — she has seen how clients look at different stages of their cases. 'Friday-fourteen-hundred-tired' is the court-date anxiety Asia has seen before; 'Older' is the different, heavier thing she notices here. Quiet concern without alarm. No names the landlord. Merge note: after hint_bonus_evidence_lease.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska looked tired today, Dr. A. Cula. Not Friday-fourteen-hundred-tired. Older.

states._comment: Fires when the readiness check is complete but the player hasn't walked north to court yet. Asia's office layer: coffee, file, taxi. These are the three things she actually organises before a court day. 'One-thirty' is consistent with the 'Friday at fourteen hundred, courtroom four' time established by Murrow — one-thirty gives travel time. 'Mr. Murrow has the file' is the domestic-admin version of readiness confirmation. Merge note: insert before the existing hint_coffee_alert_plus cluster in the live file.
lines: Coffee's brewing, Dr. A. Cula. Mr. Murrow has the file. The taxi is booked for one-thirty.

states._comment: Strong-win path: well-fitted frame, adequate judicial patience, sufficient bonus evidence. Asia notes the win without a victory lap — 'went' is her verb for a motion succeeding. Mrs. Sikorska rang, which is the practical consequence Asia handles. No doctrine named. No exclamation. Merge note: insert before hint_received_swine_postcard in live file.
lines: The motion went, Dr. A. Cula. Mrs. Sikorska rang to say thank you.

states._comment: Narrow-win path: wrong-ish frame, reduced judicial patience, partial result. Asia does not call it partial; she says 'the date is in October' — a date set means the court reset the hearing, which is the win, but October is later than it would have been on a full win. Mrs. Sikorska's restraint in saying nothing else is the signal. Asia relays it without editorialising. Merge note: after hint_post_court_won_full.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska rang. She said the date is in October. She didn't say much else.

states._comment: Best-win path: well-fitted frame, full judicial patience, costs awarded. Asia's closest-to-warmth-about-outcome line. 'Rang twice' signals something beyond the standard call. The second call being about Mr. Whimsy's voice is a perfectly Asia observation — she is proud of the result in the only way she can be, which is to notice the specific person who produced the flourish. Merge note: after hint_post_court_won_narrow.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska rang twice, Dr. A. Cula. The second time was to ask about Mr. Whimsy's voice.
